# secgurd community malicious-URL list
# Auto-generated from abuse.ch URLhaus online export (https://urlhaus.abuse.ch/)
# Updated: (not yet refreshed - run the "Refresh community malicious-URL list" Action)
# Format: <url>,<threat/tags>   (label is comma-free; split URL on the LAST comma)
#
# This file is populated automatically by .github/workflows/refresh-malurls.yml.
# Until the first run, it is empty; secgurd loads it if present and skips it if empty.
